DataRequest.Name: Windows: Network Trace with netsh exe / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects network trace being captured via netsh.exe trace functionality. This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/process_creation/win_netsh_packet_capture.yml
DataRequest.IncidentTitle: Network Trace with netsh exe on $hostName with user $user

SubPattern.name: Filter
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Sysmon-1-Create-Process" AND command REGEXP ".*netsh.*" AND command REGEXP ".*trace.*" AND command REGEXP ".*start.*"
